title: Johrenia popovii
taxonomy: Johrenia popovii is classified under the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It belongs to the genus Johrenia, which is a group of flowering plants in the order Apiales. Johrenia popovii further categorizes under the subfamily Apioideae and tribe Scandiceae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the same family. Johrenia popovii is a specific species within this classification, providing a more precise identification within the Apiaceae family.
